Mud-caked cellars, uprooted trellises, vast expanses of vineyard reduced to swampland. The historic Robertson Wine Valley rebuilds after historic floods. That’s #CarteBlanche this Sunday at 7pm on M-Net channel 101, and DStv Stream.

 #SouthAfrica #News

They were promised an Afrikaner utopia – freedom, ownership and work. Families put everything on the line – but now they are trapped in limbo. That’s #CarteBlanche this Sunday at 7pm on M-Net channel 101, and DStv Stream. 

#SouthAfrica #News

JUST IN: Convicted midwife Yolande Maritz Fouchee was sentenced to 23 years behind bars following the deaths of two babies born at her You & Me maternity centre. Two more babies were also born with cerebral palsy as a result of malpractice at the centre. #CarteBlanche

A legacy built by generations of farmers, threatened by historic floods in a matter of hours. What can be saved from the wreckage? That’s #CarteBlanche this Sunday at 7pm on M-Net channel 101, and DStv Stream. 

#SouthAfrica #News

A skateboard, a stranger, and a journey that went viral – as crowds gather, communities rally and South Africans show up for something good. That’s #CarteBlanche this Sunday at 7pm on M-Net channel 101, and DStv Stream. 

#SouthAfrica #News

When #CarteBlanche first visited Philippi a decade ago, we found a community already under pressure. When we returned in 2023, that fight had taken on a new form amid an outbreak of taxi violence. Now, Philippi Village is proving just how resilient it is. You can rewatch our 2023 story now.

Philippi on the Cape Flats has a strange dual identity. On the one hand, a historic farming district that produces a significant portion of Cape Town’s fresh produce. On the other, a densely populated apartheid-era township notorious for violent crime. #CarteBlanche #SouthAfrica #News
As Koos van der Westhuizen prepares to hand over the keys to Middelpos Hotel, he has a message for the new owner of the town of Middelpos in the Karoo. #CarteBlanche #SouthAfrica #News #Travel

Talk about inflation! Siblings Vivian and Leonard grew up in Middelpos in the Karoo. Now, as the tiny town goes up for sale, they revisit some of their favourite spots. #CarteBlanche #southafrica #news
